title: Anthropic Claude Code Plugin Manifest (Loom-side snapshot)
description: PLACEHOLDER SNAPSHOT. Source: https://code.claude.com/docs/en/plugins-reference. snapshotDate: 2026-06-17. snapshotMethod: deferred-fetch (Wave 0 placeholder; CI workflow scripts/refresh-upstream-schemas.sh MUST populate this from the live docs before Wave 1 starts). This file documents only the fields the M-07 plan currently knows about; additionalProperties is true so upstream additions do not break local validation.

author.description: GitHub org or user slug owning the plugin.

permissions.description: Derived from hooks/hooks.json matchers at plugin-build time. Doctor validates the union in DOCTOR_PERMISSIONS_MISMATCH.

entrypoints.description: Maps resource type to a directory or file path within the plugin tarball.

claudeCode.description: Minimum Claude Code version (semver range). M-07 baseline: >=2.0.0.
